subject: [PATCH v2 02/18] xfs: convert iomap ops to ->iomap_next()

reviews.author: Darrick Wong
reviews.summary: Reviewer noted that the naming convention for iomap operations may be confusing due to existing 'iter' fields and functions, suggesting a rename to avoid conflict.
reviews.raw_body:
Ok by me.  Ignore the email I just sent, please :)

--D

2026-07-02.patch_summary: This patch converts XFS iomap operations to use the ->iomap_next() function, which is a more consistent naming convention for advancing through an iteration.

2026-07-03.patch_summary: This patch converts XFS iomap operations to use the ->iomap_next() function, which is a more consistent naming convention for advancing through an iteration.
